old_title: Crime scene declared after woman found dead in Rockhampton
old_text:
A crime scene has been established after a woman was found dead in central Queensland.
Police were called to Rockhampton's CBD at about 1:15pm for a welfare check where the woman's body was found.
Police tape cordoned off two properties on Denham Street.
Officers said there was no ongoing threat to the public.
Anyone with information is being asked to contact police.
new_text:
Central Queensland police are continuing investigations into the death of a 32-year-old woman in Rockhampton yesterday.
Police were called to Rockhampton's CBD about 1:15pm for a welfare check where the woman's body was found.
A crime scene was established, with police tape cordoning off two properties on Denham Street.
Officers said there was no ongoing threat to the public.
Anyone with information is being asked to contact police.
